title: anthyllis vulneraria f. australis
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. australis, also known as Kidney Vetch, is a flowering plant that is part of the Fabaceae family and is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Kidney Vetch include its ability to stimulate blood flow, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy for skin and wound care. Kidney Vetch can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
